summary: iter224 Phase 2 ECW Ops Procurement testing complete. 18/18 backend tests passed. Mobile ECW Ops has 6 tabs (waste, linecheck, inventory, orders, recipes, photos) with horizontal scrolling tabbar (scrollWidth=443, clientWidth=390). Inventory tab shows 17 items with basket toggle and order request modal. Orders tab shows 3 sections (Incoming, My Requisitions, Recently received). Desktop Procurement panel loads with KPIs and 3 tabs (Pending/Active POs/History). Desktop Menu Builder regression passes.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (mobile 6-tab ECW Ops + desktop Procurement + Menu Builder regression)

test_credentials: X-User-Id: chef-william for mobile, X-User-Id: purchasing-manager for desktop procurement actions. devAuth=1 bypass for frontend.
seed_data_creation: Created test requisitions and POs during lifecycle testing (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter224 Phase 2 ECW Ops Procurement features tested. Backend: Full procurement lifecycle works (order-request → approve → PO with unit_prices → receive with variance → received_with_variance status). Reject flow works with rejection_reason. PO creation on pending_approval returns 409. Inventory levels returns rows with on_hand, par_suggested, low_stock, gap. Inventory count persists with counted_at + chef_id. Order-requests and purchase-orders filter by outlet_id and status. All iter224 phase 1 endpoints still work (stations, items, components, recipes, line-check, photos, published, par-suggest, summary). Frontend: Mobile /m/ecw has 6 tabs with horizontal scroll (scrollbar hidden via CSS). Inventory tab shows items with count input + basket toggle + order request FAB + modal with Cancel/Submit/Urgent. Orders tab shows 3 sections. Desktop Procurement panel has KPIs (pending/approved/active/received) + 3 tabs + ApproveModal + CreatePOModal with price inputs. Desktop Menu Builder loads correctly.
